a1b2c3d4-0001-4000-a000-000000000001.name: deployment.environment
a1b2c3d4-0001-4000-a000-000000000001.queryValue:
SELECT JSONExtractString(labels, 'deployment.environment') AS `deployment.environment`
FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4_1day
WHERE metric_name = 'istio_requests_total'
GROUP BY `deployment.environment`

a1b2c3d4-0001-4000-a000-000000000002.name: namespace
a1b2c3d4-0001-4000-a000-000000000002.queryValue:
SELECT JSONExtractString(labels, 'destination_workload_namespace') AS `namespace`
FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4_1day
WHERE metric_name = 'istio_requests_total'
GROUP BY `namespace`

a1b2c3d4-0001-4000-a000-000000000003.name: service.name
a1b2c3d4-0001-4000-a000-000000000003.queryValue:
SELECT JSONExtractString(labels, 'destination_service_name') AS `service.name`
FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4_1day
WHERE metric_name = 'istio_requests_total'
GROUP BY `service.name`

a1b2c3d4-0001-4000-a000-000000000004.name: cluster
a1b2c3d4-0001-4000-a000-000000000004.queryValue:
SELECT JSONExtractString(labels, 'destination_cluster') AS `cluster`
FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4_1day
WHERE metric_name = 'istio_requests_total'
GROUP BY `cluster`
